name: Penne with Cauliflower Tomatoes & Basil
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Finely chopped plum tomatoes (about 4 large)
2 tablespoons Sun-dried tomatoes, chopped and drained
2 cups Penne or other tubular pasta
3 cups Small cauliflower florets (about 1 medium head)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the first six ingredients and toss thoroughly.
2. Cook the pasta in a large pot of rapidly boiling salted water until almost tender. Add the cauliflower to the pasta and continue cooking until the cauliflower is tender, about 3 minutes. Drain well.
3. Add the cooked mixture to the tomato mixture in the bowl and toss. Season with salt and pepper if desired. Serve with Parmesan cheese.
